name: lna_nf
description: RF LNA noise-figure miss limited by a low-Q on-chip matching inductor. rf-design opens a fix_request with route_to: em-modeling (Phase 7 cross-domain path). em-modeling re-solves the passive to higher Q/SRF and republishes the em block; re-validation routes back to rf-design and the NF spec passes on the first cycle. No checkpoints configured.

fr_lna_nf_001.diff_summary: Re-solved input matching inductor (wider top-metal turns, increased spacing): Q 8 -> 14, SRF above band; refit lumped model. NF now 2.3 dB at the failing corner.
